name: HubSpot CRM
description: HubSpot CRM (28 tools): full coverage of contacts, companies, deals and tickets (list/search/get/create/update/delete), engagements (notes, tasks), associations (v4), pipelines, owners. Private App token auth.

credentials_required.label: HubSpot Private App Access Token
credentials_required.hint: Create in HubSpot: Settings (gear) → Integrations → Private Apps → Create. In the 'Scopes' tab enable: crm.objects.contacts.read+write, crm.objects.companies.read+write, crm.objects.deals.read+write, crm.objects.owners.read, tickets (read+write), crm.lists.read+write. Copy the Access Token (starts with 'pat-eu1-...' or 'pat-na1-...').

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List recent contacts (paginated). Optional: limit (1-100, default 10)

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by email, name, phone or any property. Uses HubSpot search filters (propertyName + operator + value)

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get a contact by id or email (auto-detects)

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact. At least email or name required. Optional: firstname, lastname, phone, company, jobtitle, lifecyclestage

tools.name: update_contact
tools.description: Update contact properties by id

tools.name: delete_contact
tools.description: Archive (soft-delete) a contact by id. Can be restored within 90 days in HubSpot UI

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search companies by name, domain, or any property

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Get a company by id

tools.name: create_company
tools.description: Create a new company. Requires name or domain. Optional: phone, city, country, industry, description, numberofemployees

tools.name: update_company
tools.description: Update company properties by id

tools.name: delete_company
tools.description: Archive (soft-delete) a company by id

tools.name: list_deals
tools.description: List recent deals (paginated). Optional: limit

tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search deals by stage, owner, amount, closedate or any property

tools.name: get_deal
tools.description: Get a deal by id (includes properties + associated contacts/companies)

tools.name: create_deal
tools.description: Create a new deal. Requires dealname. Optional: amount, dealstage, pipeline, closedate, hubspot_owner_id, associated_contact_id, associated_company_id

tools.name: update_deal
tools.description: Update deal properties by id (e.g. move to new stage, update amount)

tools.name: delete_deal
tools.description: Archive (soft-delete) a deal by id

tools.name: search_tickets
tools.description: Search tickets (Service Hub) by status, pipeline, owner, priority or any property

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Get a ticket by id

tools.name: create_ticket
tools.description: Create a new ticket. Requires subject. Optional: content, hs_pipeline, hs_pipeline_stage, hs_ticket_priority, hubspot_owner_id, associated_contact_id

tools.name: update_ticket
tools.description: Update ticket properties by id (e.g. change status, priority, assign owner)

tools.name: delete_ticket
tools.description: Archive (soft-delete) a ticket by id

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a note and optionally associate it with a contact, company, deal or ticket (pass associated_contact_id / associated_company_id / associated_deal_id / associated_ticket_id)

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a task with subject, body, due-date (ISO-date), priority (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH), status (NOT_STARTED/IN_PROGRESS/COMPLETED), type (TODO/CALL/EMAIL) and optional associated object id + owner

tools.name: associate_objects
tools.description: Associate two CRM objects (v4 default association). Params: from_type, from_id, to_type, to_id. Types: contacts, companies, deals, tickets, notes, tasks

tools.name: list_associations
tools.description: List objects associated with a source object. Params: from_type, from_id, to_type

tools.name: list_pipelines
tools.description: List pipelines for deals or tickets (incl. stages). Param: object_type (deals|tickets)

tools.name: list_owners
tools.description: List HubSpot users / owners (for hubspot_owner_id assignments)

author: freddy-schuetz
